title: Module 7.1: Event Safety Planning
subtitle: Master the Fundamentals of Event Safety Planning and Management
description: Learn comprehensive event safety planning from initial concept through post-event review. This module covers hazard assessments, safety policies, regulatory coordination, and the development of effective safety management systems for live entertainment events.
learning_objectives: Develop comprehensive event safety management plans
Coordinate effectively with public service agencies and authorities
Create health and safety policies that meet regulatory requirements
Apply the four phases of event production planning
Establish effective safety monitoring and review systems

research_alignment.interactive_design: Progressive disclosure for complex planning content
